name: Hot Chocolate- Al Martin
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Half and Half, or Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler, combine the milk chocolate, butter, and vanilla.
2. Stir until completely melted and smooth.
3. Gradually add the half and half (or cream) as it heats, ensuring not to boil.
4. Serve over a handful of miniature marshmallows.
5. Garnish with a dash of nutmeg.
Makes 1 serving.
